positive: A minimalist, whimsical illustration of a vibrant, starry cosmic ocean meeting a bioluminescent forest at dawn. Focus on stylized silhouettes of giant, gentle jellyfish floating amongst stylized mangrove roots and jungle foliage. The color palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and pops of glowing neon teal. The lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, coming from the horizon line, casting strong, readable contrasts suitable for a repeating pattern print. Style: Art Deco meets Nordic mythology, clean vector lines, high contrast, ink wash texture on digital render. Central composition, square aspect ratio.
